news.t: Are Municipal Bonds Ideal Second-Half Fixed Income Plays?
Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
Schwab Asset Management Reduces Fees on Two Fixed Income ETFs, Pricing Its Entire Fixed Income Lineup at Three Basis Points
The Schwab Municipal Bond ETF (SCMB) Begins Trading

overview.description: The Schwab Municipal Bond ETF (SCMB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated, investment grade tax-exempt debt, issued by US states and territories with varying maturities. SCMB was launched on Oct 12, 2022 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: ICE AMT-Free Core U.S. National Municipal Index
